description: POPCAT emerged in 2023 on Solana as a viral pixel-cat meme that spread across Web3 through humor, chaos, and massive community energy. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 POPCAT gives POPCAT holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, and staking support, turning a viral meme into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Popcat
